india_trends.title: Titan, Kalyan Jewellers to Senco Gold: Jewellery stocks slump up to 6% after gold, silver import duty hike
india_trends.summary: Jewellery stocks faced significant selling on May 13 after the government increased customs duties on gold and silver to 15%. Major companies like Kalyan Jewellers and Titan saw declines up to 6%, raising concerns over input costs and demand.

india_trends.title: Global Market: OECD sees Bank of Japan raising rates to 2% by 2027 amid inflation shift
india_trends.summary: Japan's central bank might increase interest rates to two percent by late 2027. This move signals confidence in Japan's economy moving past decades of low inflation. Stronger wages and consumer demand allow for gradual borrowing cost hikes. The Bank of Japan is also expected to reduce bond purchases

india_trends.summary: The rupee has touched a fresh low of 95.63 against the dollar, with USD/INR hovering in the 95.6–95.7 range amid elevated crude prices, firm dollar demand, and sustained foreign institutional outflows

india_trends.title: Vodafone Idea shares in focus as telco set to consider fundraise on May 16. What lies ahead?
india_trends.summary: Vodafone Idea's board will meet on May 16 to consider raising funds through equity and warrants, following recent government relief on Adjusted Gross Revenue (AGR) dues. The company's AGR dues were reduced by 27% to Rs 64,046 crore, with a new payment schedule. This potential fundraise aims to boost

india_trends.title: Sensex rises 120 points, Nifty above 23,400 as rupee recovers from all-time low. What lies ahead?
india_trends.summary: Indian stock markets rebounded on Wednesday, with Sensex and Nifty ending a four-day losing streak. The recovery was driven by a stronger rupee and easing oil prices, despite ongoing geopolitical tensions. Broad-based optimism saw midcap and smallcap indices also gain, with Asian Paints leading the

india_trends.title: Hindustan Zinc, Vedanta to NALCO: Metal stocks jump after India raises import duty in gold, silver, other metals
india_trends.summary: Metal stocks surged on May 13, driven by rising gold and silver prices after the government raised import duties on precious metals. Hindustan Zinc led the gains, with Nifty Metal climbing 1.3%. Gold and silver prices hit upper circuits, reflecting strong buying interest.

india_trends.summary: Wealthy investors are making significant moves, pouring over $1 billion into ten select stocks. This concentrated buying occurs even as their overall portfolio value has decreased. Data shows these high-net-worth individuals are strategically picking specific retail and engineering companies. india_trends.title: Silver jumps Rs 17,000/kg, gold soars to Rs 1.62 lakh/10g after centre hikes import duty. What should investors do?
india_trends.summary: Gold and silver prices surged on MCX after the government hiked customs duty on precious metal imports to 15%. This led to significant jumps in July 2026 silver futures and June 2026 gold futures. The move follows a rise in U.S. consumer inflation, impacting global market sentiment and reducing expe

india_trends.title: Copper Climbs Toward Record High as Global Supply Tightens
india_trends.summary: Copper extended gains above $14,000 a ton, inching toward a record high seen earlier this year, as supply risks mount on mine disruptions around the world.

india_trends.title: Dr Reddy's shares in focus after Q4 net profit tumbles 86% YoY; Morgan Stanley, Goldman Sachs weigh in
india_trends.summary: Dr. Reddy's Laboratories shares: The pharma major posted a sharp 86% YoY drop in Q4FY26 consolidated net profit to Rs 221 crore, compared with Rs 1,587 crore a year ago. Following the weak earnings performance, several brokerages cut their target prices on the stock.

india_trends.title: Gold rate today: MCX gold rate jumps above ₹1.62 lakh per 10 grams, silver price rallies 6% after import duty hike
india_trends.summary: Gold rate today: The central government has raised import tariffs on gold and silver to 15% from 6% in an effort to reduce overseas purchases of precious metals and ease pressure on foreign exchange reserves.

india_trends.title: Rupee opens 2 paise higher at 95.61 against the US dollar
india_trends.summary: Rupee opens 2 paise higher at 95.61 against the US dollar

india_trends.title: Silver price hits 6% upper circuit to ₹2.95 lk as India hikes import duty amid West Asia tensions, sticky US inflation
india_trends.summary: Silver prices surged on May 13 due to India's hike in import duties on precious metals. MCX silver hit ₹2,95,805 per kg and gold reached ₹1,62,648 per 10 grams, reflecting strong global support amid inflation and geopolitical tensions.

india_trends.title: From India to China, a look at what governments worldwide are doing to shield households from rising energy costs
india_trends.summary: Governments globally are implementing diverse strategies to mitigate soaring energy costs stemming from the U.S.-Israeli war on Iran. Measures include fuel tax adjustments, reserve releases, external financing, subsidies, tax cuts, and energy conservation efforts. Countries are also exploring increa

india_trends.title: Rising inflation, Hormuz deadlock, Trump-Xi meet: What’s driving global news headlines
india_trends.summary: Inflation is flaring up again as the West Asia war disrupts energy flows and keeps oil above $100 amid a prolonged Strait of Hormuz standoff. The Trump-Xi meeting could reshape trade dynamics, while the 2026 World Cup promises a sizeable global growth boost.

india_trends.title: Rural India, agro chemicals, and value retail: Where Aniruddha Naha is putting money to work
india_trends.summary: Aniruddha Naha of PGIM India sees opportunity in rural India's revival. He advises investors to build portfolios now for a stronger FY28. Naha is avoiding lenders and infrastructure sectors. He believes mid and smallcaps show resilience. The next two quarters may be challenging for earnings. However
